Example_EN: Many people perceive remote work as more flexible.
Example_CN: 许多人认为远程办公更灵活。

Example_EN: Exercise is part of her morning routine.
Example_CN: 锻炼是她晨间日常的一部分。

Example_EN: The dirty dishes are still in the kitchen sink.
Example_CN: 脏盘子还在厨房水槽里。

Example_EN: It is rude to stare at strangers on the bus.
Example_CN: 在公交上盯着陌生人看不礼貌。

Example_EN: She does not work here anymore.
Example_CN: 她已不在这里工作了。

Example_EN: Firefighters became local heroes after the rescue.
Example_CN: 消防员在救援后成为当地英雄。

Example_EN: He is a strong supporter of cleaner energy.
Example_CN: 他是清洁能源的坚定支持者。

Example_EN: They converted the old factory into studios.
Example_CN: 他们把旧工厂改造成工作室。

Example_EN: The company reported steady growth last year.
Example_CN: 公司去年报告了稳定增长。

Example_EN: Please read the gas meter before you leave.
Example_CN: 离开前请抄煤气表读数。
MemoryTip: lemma 用 meter；英式长度单位常写 metre。

Example_EN: The delivery truck arrived before noon.
Example_CN: 送货卡车中午前到了。
MemoryTip: truck 偏美式；英式常说 lorry。

Example_EN: He wiped his nose with a clean tissue.
Example_CN: 他用干净纸巾擦了擦鼻子。

Example_EN: She sat beside her sister during the film.
Example_CN: 看电影时她坐在妹妹旁边。

Example_EN: They will sail across the lake tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 他们明早将驶过湖面。

Example_EN: The flood was the worst natural disaster in decades.
Example_CN: 这场洪水是几十年来最严重的自然灾害。

Collocation: at a slow pace;keep pace with;change the pace
Example_EN: She walked at a slow pace up the hill.
Example_CN: 她慢慢走上山坡。

Example_EN: It rained heavily throughout the afternoon.
Example_CN: 整个下午雨下得很大。

Collocation: devote time to;devote oneself to;fully devote
Example_EN: She decides to devote more time to learning French.
Example_CN: 她决定把更多时间用于学法语。

Example_EN: Security was increased after the terrorist attack.
Example_CN: 恐怖袭击后安保加强了。

Collocation: justify a decision;hard to justify;justify the cost
Example_EN: Can you justify spending so much on advertising?
Example_CN: 你能说明花这么多广告费合理吗？

Example_EN: Clean water plays a vital role in public health.
Example_CN: 清洁水对公共健康至关重要。

Example_EN: Space travel continues to fascinate young students.
Example_CN: 太空旅行继续让年轻学生着迷。

Example_EN: External factors may affect the exam results.
Example_CN: 外部因素可能影响考试成绩。

Example_EN: Do you have a spare key for the front door?
Example_CN: 前门你有备用钥匙吗？

Example_EN: Call me whenever you need help with maths.
Example_CN: 学数学需要帮助时随时打给我。

Example_EN: She sought help for clinical depression last year.
Example_CN: 她去年因抑郁症寻求帮助。
MemoryTip: depress → depression：情绪低落/经济萧条。

Example_EN: He felt guilty about forgetting her birthday.
Example_CN: 忘了她的生日，他感到内疚。

Collocation: underlie the problem;underlying cause;factors that underlie
Example_EN: Poverty may underlie many social problems.
Example_CN: 贫困可能是许多社会问题的深层原因。

Example_EN: My mom packed lunch for me every morning.
Example_CN: 妈妈每天早上给我装午饭。
MemoryTip: mom 偏美式；英式常写 mum。

Example_EN: It is important to make a clear distinction between facts and opinions.
Example_CN: 分清事实与观点很重要。

Example_EN: Customer satisfaction rose after the new service started.
Example_CN: 新服务上线后顾客满意度上升。

Example_EN: Please incorporate teacher feedback into your draft.
Example_CN: 请把老师的反馈写入你的草稿。

Example_EN: Please pour some water into the glass.
Example_CN: 请往杯子里倒些水。

Collocation: sweep the floor;sweep away;sweep the election
Example_EN: Please sweep the floor before guests arrive.
Example_CN: 客人到来前请扫地。

Example_EN: Parents have a legal obligation to send children to school.
Example_CN: 家长有送孩子上学的法定义务。

Example_EN: Excuse me, sir, is this seat free?
Example_CN: 打扰一下，先生，这个座位空着吗？

Example_EN: Teachers evaluate student performance each term.
Example_CN: 教师每学期评估学生表现。

Example_EN: He tried to control his anger during the argument.
Example_CN: 争论中他努力控制怒气。

Collocation: local pub;go to the pub;pub lunch
Example_EN: We met friends at the local pub after work.
Example_CN: 下班后我们在附近酒吧见了朋友。

Example_EN: Public perception of the policy is slowly changing.
Example_CN: 公众对该政策的看法在慢慢改变。

Example_EN: Some plants grow naturally without any fertilizer.
Example_CN: 有些植物无需肥料就能自然生长。

Example_EN: You can change foreign currency at the airport.
Example_CN: 你可以在机场兑换外币。

Collocation: customer database;search a database;update the database
Example_EN: Please search the customer database for her email.
Example_CN: 请在客户数据库中查找她的邮箱。

Example_EN: The project was initially planned for next month.
Example_CN: 该项目最初计划在下月进行。

Example_EN: The island became part of national territory in 1950.
Example_CN: 该岛于1950年成为国家领土。

Example_EN: Children played beside a clear mountain stream.
Example_CN: 孩子们在清澈的山溪边玩耍。

Example_EN: She rarely eats sweets during the week.
Example_CN: 她工作日很少吃甜食。

Collocation: at a height of;height of summer;measure height
Example_EN: The tower stands at a height of eighty metres.
Example_CN: 这座塔高八十米。

Collocation: become apparent;apparent reason;it is apparent that
Example_EN: It soon became apparent that the plan would fail.
Example_CN: 很快就明显看出计划会失败。

Example_EN: Many western countries share similar education systems.
Example_CN: 许多西方国家有相似的教育体系。

Example_EN: Rapid expansion brought both jobs and traffic problems.
Example_CN: 快速扩张既带来就业也带来交通问题。

Example_EN: Technology is constantly changing the way we learn.
Example_CN: 技术不断改变我们的学习方式。

Example_EN: Regular exercise helps build muscle strength.
Example_CN: 规律锻炼有助于增强肌肉力量。

Example_EN: Loud thunder can scare young children.
Example_CN: 响雷会吓到小孩子。

Example_EN: The roof was badly damaged in the storm.
Example_CN: 屋顶在风暴中严重受损。

Example_EN: Mobile phones are part of everyday life now.
Example_CN: 手机如今已是日常生活的一部分。

Example_EN: The river forms the boundary between the two towns.
Example_CN: 这条河构成两镇的边界。

Collocation: student-teacher ratio;high ratio;in a ratio of
Example_EN: The student-teacher ratio in this school is quite low.
Example_CN: 这所学校的师生比相当低。

Example_EN: Students must write a short essay on climate change.
Example_CN: 学生须写一篇关于气候变化的短文。

Collocation: scream for help;scream loudly;a loud scream
Example_EN: Someone screamed for help near the river.
Example_CN: 有人在河边大声呼救。

Example_EN: He went to the bank to withdraw some money.
Example_CN: 他去银行取了些钱。

Example_EN: The city is working hard to reduce air pollution.
Example_CN: 这座城市正努力减少空气污染。

Example_EN: Lack of sleep can lead to a sleep disorder.
Example_CN: 睡眠不足可能导致睡眠障碍。

Example_EN: We need new furniture for the living room.
Example_CN: 客厅需要新家具。

Example_EN: The dove is a common symbol of peace.
Example_CN: 鸽子是常见的和平象征。

Example_EN: They rent a small apartment near the university.
Example_CN: 他们在大学附近租了一套小公寓。
MemoryTip: apartment 偏美式；英式常说 flat。

Example_EN: Thousands joined a peaceful demonstration for climate action.
Example_CN: 数千人参加和平示威呼吁气候行动。

Example_EN: A data analyst checked the sales figures carefully.
Example_CN: 数据分析师仔细核对了销售数字。

Example_EN: Please wait on platform three for the next train.
Example_CN: 请在3号站台等候下一班火车。

Example_EN: The bridge is made of strong steel.
Example_CN: 这座桥由坚固钢材建成。

Example_EN: She baked a chocolate cake for the party.
Example_CN: 她为聚会烤了巧克力蛋糕。

Example_EN: Digital tools can transform the way students learn.
Example_CN: 数字工具能改变学生的学习方式。

Example_EN: The nurse cleaned the wound carefully.
Example_CN: 护士仔细清理了伤口。

Example_EN: New travel restrictions start next Monday.
Example_CN: 新旅行限制下周一生效。

Example_EN: Reading lays the foundation for later learning.
Example_CN: 阅读为以后的学习打下基础。

Example_EN: She works as a graphic designer in London.
Example_CN: 她在伦敦做平面设计师。

Collocation: put a strain on;muscle strain;financial strain
Example_EN: Long hours put a strain on family life.
Example_CN: 长时间工作给家庭生活带来压力。

Example_EN: Technological innovation is changing everyday transport.
Example_CN: 技术创新正在改变日常出行。

Example_EN: The band released a new music album last month.
Example_CN: 乐队上个月发行了新音乐专辑。

Example_EN: The lead singer asked the crowd to sing along.
Example_CN: 主唱请观众一起唱。

Collocation: hiking trail;leave a trail;follow a trail
Example_EN: We followed a hiking trail through the forest.
Example_CN: 我们沿着徒步小径穿越森林。

Collocation: set a trap;fall into a trap;trap someone
Example_EN: Mice can fall into a trap in the kitchen.
Example_CN: 老鼠可能掉进厨房的捕鼠器。

Example_EN: Wear loose clothes when you exercise.
Example_CN: 锻炼时穿宽松衣服。

Example_EN: The teacher granted a two-day deadline extension.
Example_CN: 老师批准了两天的截止延期。

Example_EN: Oil brought great wealth to the region.
Example_CN: 石油给该地区带来巨大财富。

Example_EN: Her health improved gradually after the operation.
Example_CN: 手术后她的健康逐渐好转。

Example_EN: Check the water tank before watering the garden.
Example_CN: 浇花前检查水箱。

Example_EN: In the story, the hero defeats an evil king.
Example_CN: 故事中英雄打败了邪恶的国王。

Example_EN: Her recovery after surgery was truly remarkable.
Example_CN: 她手术后的康复非常了不起。

Example_EN: The children learned a catchy new tune.
Example_CN: 孩子们学会了一支朗朗上口的新曲子。

Collocation: cut the grass;green grass;lie on the grass
Example_EN: Please do not walk on the fresh green grass.
Example_CN: 请勿踩踏新绿的草地。

Collocation: wedding invitation;send an invitation;accept an invitation
Example_EN: She sent an invitation to all her classmates.
Example_CN: 她给所有同学发了邀请。

Example_EN: The school plans a smooth transition to online classes.
Example_CN: 学校计划平稳过渡到线上课。

Example_EN: Loud fireworks may frighten pets at night.
Example_CN: 夜里响亮的烟火可能吓到宠物。

Example_EN: Several companies made a bid for the contract.
Example_CN: 几家公司为该合同投标。

Example_EN: Farmers breed cattle for milk and meat.
Example_CN: 农民饲养牛以产奶和产肉。

Example_EN: She showed extraordinary courage during the rescue.
Example_CN: 她在救援中表现出非凡勇气。

Example_EN: That was a brilliant idea for the science fair.
Example_CN: 那是科博会上的绝妙主意。

Example_EN: Talk to a career adviser before choosing a major.
Example_CN: 选专业前先咨询职业顾问。

Example_EN: Many problems stem from poor communication.
Example_CN: 许多问题源于沟通不良。
